infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pensée needs access to your photo library to save and share your writing exports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Pensée needs access to save your writing exports to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Pensée uses your camera so you can photograph handwritten notes and add them to your writing.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Pensée uses your microphone so you can dictate text into your writing session.
